top_signals.title: Goldman Is Said to Work on Kuwaiti Retailer’s IPO
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. is working on a potential initial public offering of a Kuwaiti online beauty and fashion retailer, a deal that could mark the Wall Street bank’s first listing mandate in the Gulf nation as it seeks to expand there.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Cambodia Starts UN Process to Resolve Maritime Dispute with Thailand
top_signals.summary: Cambodia on Tuesday said it informed the United Nations and Thailand that it had launched a compulsory conciliation process under international law aimed at resolving a long-running maritime boundary dispute with Bangkok.The move follows a Thai…
